Bash(head -20 ~/.claude/projects/-Users-lu-code-small-projects-intentlint/0abea86a-ba4*.jsonl 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, json
for i, line in enumerate\(sys.stdin\):
    try:
        obj = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
        t = obj.get\('type', '?'\)
        if t == 'user':
            msg = obj.get\('message', {}\)
            content = msg.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(msg, dict\) else ''
            if isinstance\(content, str\):
                print\(f'Line {i}: USER first80={content[:80]}'\)
            elif isinstance\(content, list\):
                types = [b.get\('type','?'\) for b in content if isinstance\(b, dict\)]
                texts = [b.get\('text',''\)[:80] for b in content if isinstance\(b, dict\) and b.get\('type'\)=='text']
                print\(f'Line {i}: USER blocks={types} texts={texts}'\)
    except: pass
" 2>&1)
